since_last: 52% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.92% · BTC -2.63% · Gold -2.20% · Nasdaq100 +2.01%. 52% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.54%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +9.81%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +9.81%, CEVA +7.87%, SMCI +7.49%, MU +7.24%, TLN +7.22%. Laggards: INOD -9.46%, IBM -6.56%, SPCX -5.96%, MDB -5.49%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.96% at $180.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
